contradictions_detected.issue: V3 define S23 como 'Browser RPA con Playwright'. Plataforma id 'computer-vision' es 'Visión por Computadora y Camera Feeds en Tiempo Real' (src/lib/course/sections/s23-computer-vision.ts).
contradictions_detected.resolution: KEEP platform id 'computer-vision' (learning_roadmap.md authority). TARGET production content = V3 4×2. Legacy inventariado, no borrado.
contradictions_detected.authority: learning_roadmap.md = id/title platform; V3 = counting + outcomes target
contradictions_detected.impact: No claim de section passed. PHASE 4+ retheme.
